name: ERP Gold Report Depth — Source Registry
policy: original summaries; no third-party source vendored

sources.title: ReportsService.cs — company-scoped, submitted-only registers, party summaries, outstanding lists, receivables aging, tax summary, stock valuation, reorder and work-order summary using EF aggregation with no group-by-constant

ReportsDepthTests.cs — xUnit tests proving register/summary reconciliation, aging-bucket correctness, tax reconciliation, valuation, reorder threshold and company scoping (part of the 255-test Gold suite)
Subledger reporting, receivables aging, tax output/input reconciliation and stock-valuation reporting principles
